inline_comments.message:
Removing the database files and the pv-pvc removes persistent data.
This was done here: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/10565/

Borislav, I tried using /var/logs/onap, but it has thrown an error.

Ah I see, basically the same script that is forked externally and run via kubectl.
Yes, it's just updating the forked script and adapting for OOM
It would be nice if the names would reflect the port number, but this is not blocking the review.
